Feature_Description: This procedure is used for the case the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU when only MCG SRB is available during EN-DC operation.
This procedure is used for the case when the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU during NR operation.
The procedure used for LTM (Long Term Mobility) with the change of gNB-CU-UP within a gNB.
Feature_Objectives: To create an UE context and setup one or more data bearers at the target gNB-DU.
To initiate LTM configuration procedures between gNB-CU and candidate gNB-DUs.
Feature_Implementation_Steps: The gNB-CU has to prepare and send F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST" message to the candidate gNB-DU.
The candidate gNB-DU has to respond with F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE" message.
This message exchange has to be handled on gNB-CU for Inter gNB DU LTM Handover.
Procedure_Implementation_Steps: The gNB-CU sends an UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the target gNB-DU to create an UE context and setup one or more data bearers. The UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message includes a CG ConfigInfo (for MCG SRB mobility) or a HandoverPreparationInformation (for intra-NR mobility). In case of NG-RAN sharing, the gNB-CU includes the serving PLMN ID (for SNPNs the serving SNPN ID).
The target gNB-DU responds to the gNB-CU with an UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message.
LTM configuration procedures are performed between gNB-CU and candidate gNB-DUs, and between gNB-CU and source gNB-DU.

Code_Instructions.description: Data structure defining the format of the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message, which is sent from gNB-CU to gNB-DU during Inter-gNB-DU LTM Handover.
Data structure defining the format of the F1AP UE Context Setup Response message, which is sent from gNB-DU to gNB-CU during Inter-gNB-DU LTM Handover.
Helper function used by the gNB-CU to prepare and populate the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message with relevant RRC and UE context information before sending it to the gNB-DU.
A utility function likely responsible for the lower-level encoding or formatting of the F1AP UE Context Setup Request message, translating internal data structures into the F1AP message format.
Utility function to retrieve UE-specific F1AP data or context from the gNB-CU's internal state, essential for populating F1AP messages or identifying the UE during F1AP message processing.

Piggy_Backed_IES_Info: Not applicable for the scoped messages in this procedure.
